tracked_issues.context: Q3 systemic FAIL→SKIP applicability bug — runner conflates 'media-buy agent' with 'any agent'. Deferred to adcp 3.1.0; resurfaces when capability-derived skip_if grammar lands runner-side in @adcp/client. Until then, error_handling / validation / schema_compliance stay skipped on signals-only agents.
